CustomField.label: Party Size
CustomField.description: Total number of people expected for this session, including the host who booked it. Set at booking time (Experience Cloud "Fairway Bay Booking" flow, or staff phone-in booking). Used to gate check-in: once this many Session_Participant__c records exist for the session, no further trickle-in joins are allowed. See BOOKING_CHECKIN_PROCESS.md Case 1. Blank means no party-size cap was set (e.g. today's single walk-ins).
